footer.disclaimer: RelocateWise is decision support, not legal or immigration advice. Verify any visa or residency information with the destination country's official sources.

consent.text: We don't collect personal data and don't set tracking cookies. We only remember this choice on this device.

landing.title: Find Your Next Home, Powered by Data.
landing.sub: Answer a 5-minute questionnaire and get objective city recommendations tailored to your budget, climate, and lifestyle.
landing.note: No sign-up, no email, no tracking. Your answers stay on this device.

objective.title: Objective matching
objective.body: No sponsor bias. Rankings come from primary open data (UN, OECD, Numbeo, government portals).

comparisons.title: Deep comparisons
comparisons.body: Compare 2–3 cities side-by-side on 8 dimensions, with the best match in each row highlighted.

privacy.title: Privacy first
privacy.body: No account, no tracking cookies, no email capture. The whole experience is state-free on the server.

privacy.title: Your privacy on RelocateWise
privacy.lead: RelocateWise ranks cities based on your answers. We do not collect personal information. There is no account, no email, and no third-party tracking.
privacy.collectAnswers: The answers you give in the questionnaire (climate preference, cost priorities, career industry, etc.).
privacy.collectNothing: Nothing else. No name, no email, no IP-based profile, no advertising ID.
privacy.useMatch: We send your answers to our matching engine, which returns a ranked list of cities.
privacy.useNoStore: The engine runs in a single request — your answers are not stored on our servers and are not used to train any model.
privacy.useShortlist: The shortlist you build for comparison lives only in your browser tab. Refreshing the page clears it.
privacy.never1: We never sell or share your data.
privacy.never2: We never set tracking cookies or third-party analytics.
privacy.never3: We never require you to sign up.
privacy.contact: If you have a privacy question, open an issue on the public repository that hosts this project. There is no support inbox collecting emails.

labels.climateHelp: Pick the climate you'd most like to live in.
labels.budgetHelp: Pick a level (1 = very cheap, 5 = very pricey). Skipping means cost doesn't factor in.
labels.careerHelp: Pick the industry you'd most like to work in.
labels.healthcareHelp: How important is access to good healthcare?
labels.educationHelp: How important are schools and universities for you?
labels.communityHelp: Pick all that apply — the more you pick, the stricter the filter.
labels.densityHelp: How dense do you want your surroundings?
labels.militarySafetyHelp: How important is geopolitical stability and physical safety? A higher rating acts as a heavy filter on the overall city match.

titles: How dense do you want it?
How much does geopolitical stability matter?
wizard.noTagsSelected: No tags selected — dimension treated as "no preference".

error.fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.

results.title: Your top matches
results.hint: Pick {{count}} more {{city}} to compare side by side (up to {{max}}).
results.summary_one: 1 city saved for comparison. Pick at least one more.
results.emptyBody: Submit the questionnaire to see your top matches. We don't keep any of your answers, so a refresh means starting fresh.
results.shortlistFull: You can compare up to 3 cities. Please remove one first.

compare.title: Compare cities
compare.sub: Comparing {{count}} of {{max}} possible cities. The best match in each row is highlighted.
compare.insufficient: Please select at least 2 cities to compare.
compare.dropped: You now have fewer than 2 cities in your comparison.

why.cost: Fits your housing and cost budget
why.military_safety: High geopolitical stability and physical safety
why.neutral: A balanced match across all your priorities
